overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Temple of Britomartis. The player character walks from an exterior construction area through the grand temple entrance into an ornate interior hall with Minoan-style murals, ascends a grand staircase, explores the upper colonnade level with ancient pottery, encounters a stationary NPC guard, and approaches an exterior exit.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the temple entrance past a makeshift tent and wooden scaffolding

entered.detail: blue and grey patched canvas tent with wooden pole supports
rough timber scaffolding structure against the temple wall
large vertical wooden planks forming the temple doorway
light-colored stone paving slabs leading to the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens outside the Temple of Britomartis on a sunny day. The camera approaches the temple entrance along a stone walkway, passing a makeshift canvas tent and wooden scaffolding structures that suggest ongoing construction or restoration work on the ancient building.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance corridor with painted murals

events.description: crossing from bright exterior into the shaded temple interior through massive wooden columns

agents.ego_description: passing through the large wooden doorway into the temple's entrance hall, observing the ancient murals on the walls

entered.detail: tall fluted wooden columns with red and gold decorative bands at the base
stone walls painted with colorful frescoes depicting figures and geometric patterns
dark opening leading deeper into the temple interior

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the temple through massive wooden columns, transitioning from bright sunlight to a dimmer interior illuminated by light filtering through openings. The walls are adorned with ancient murals and decorative geometric borders in red and gold.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with double staircase and ornate ceiling

events.description: beginning to ascend the left grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall, looking up at the ornate ceiling and examining the symmetrical double staircase

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with red painted sides ascending to upper level
intricate wooden ceiling with geometric patterns and red painted beams
walls painted in deep red with gold Greek key patterns and decorative borders
large fluted column supporting the ceiling at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand hall featuring a magnificent double staircase ascending to an upper level. The camera pans to take in the ornate wooden ceiling with geometric patterns and the red walls decorated with gold borders before beginning to climb the left staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper colonnade with columns and storage pottery

events.description: NPC guard comes into view near the columns

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs and emerging onto the upper balcony level, walking past large storage jars and columns

notable_agents.action: guard standing near columns wearing armor and carrying a round shield

entered.detail: wooden railing with X-patterned design overlooking the lower hall
fluted stone columns with red and white banded bases supporting the roof
large clay amphorae and storage jars with woven patterns
intricate geometric patterned carpet and tiled floor in red and beige
decorative stone lattice windows allowing light to filter through

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the camera explores the upper colonnade level featuring tall marble columns, decorative wooden railings, and numerous ancient pottery vessels. Light filters through lattice windows, illuminating the patterned floor tiles as an armored NPC guard becomes visible near the columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor leading to exterior exit

events.description: NPC guard performs stretching animation and looks around
approaching the exit doorway with bright exterior light visible

agents.ego_description: moving past the NPC guard, continuing along the upper corridor, and descending stairs toward the exit

notable_agents.action: guard stretching and yawning, then resuming watch position

entered.detail: stone seating along the wall with carved decorative panels
large wooden doors opening to bright exterior light
stone steps leading down toward the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the NPC guard who is stretching near a stone bench, then proceeds along the upper corridor lined with decorative wall panels. The segment ends as the camera descends a staircase toward a brightly lit exit doorway, transitioning from the interior back toward the exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, active construction site outside the Temple of Britomartis into the dim, ornate grandeur of its interior. It begins on a sunny stone walkway, passing a canvas tent and wooden scaffolding that frame the temple's exterior. As the camera moves forward, it passes through massive wooden columns, transitioning from the brilliant daylight into a shaded interior where light filters through openings to reveal red and gold murals. The scene then opens into a grand hall, panning across a decorative wooden ceiling and gold-bordered walls before finally ascending a magnificent double staircase toward the upper level.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ornate upper gallery that eventually leads back toward the bright exterior of the temple. It begins by exploring the upper colonnade, where light filters through lattice windows to illuminate marble columns, wooden railings, and scattered ancient pottery. As the camera advances across the patterned floor tiles, it approaches an armored NPC guard stretching near a stone bench. The scene then shifts along a corridor lined with decorative wall panels before turning toward a descending staircase. Finally, the camera moves downward, transitioning from the shaded interior halls toward a brightly lit exit doorway.
